nameMeanings.name: McHardy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from a Gaelic personal name, which is most likely to be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Mhuircheartaigh (see McCurdy ). Mac Chardaidh ‘son of the sloe’, has also been suggested as an origin, but this seems implausible.

variants.name: McCurdy
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Mhuircheartaich or Mac Mhuircheartaigh, a patronymic from Muircheartach, a personal name composed of the elements muir ‘sea’ + ceartach ‘ruler’, hence ‘skilled seaman’. See also McCord 1 and compare Moriarty .

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: Donald McHardy was born in 1125, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He had at least 2 daughters with Susan Edith MacDonachadh. He died in Invercauld House, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Donald McHardy(은)는 1125년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Susan Edith MacDonachadh(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 인버카드 허스에서 사망했다.
